display.purpose: Homepage and public storytelling only. Must fit 2-3 lines.

headline.purpose: Route headings and major status summaries.

mono.purpose: Slugs, routes, hashes, correlation IDs, and numeric alignment.

shadows.name: raised-surface
shadows.purpose: Status cards, public object summaries, and floating action panels.

shadows.name: command-surface
shadows.purpose: High-stakes readback panels, admin repair panels, and modal/dialog surfaces.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Confident exits, public hero reveals, and non-blocking route entry.

motion.name: duration-route
motion.purpose: Route-level or panel entry where motion is justified.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary route action. One per action area.

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary route action with structural border.

components.name: Status Card
components.description: Canonical object readback surface for public/index/discovery/trust state.
components.html:
Service page status

Published. Discovery updates are still running.

narrative.overview: Agentic Economy is a source-owned control surface for public truth: calm enough for owners under pressure, sharp enough for operators repairing failures, and distinctive enough that the public service catalog does not read like another SaaS template.
keyCharacteristics: Source-owned status is always visible and textual.
One action accent carries primary action and focus.
Command-ink panels are reserved for high-stakes readback and admin context.
Forms, badges, cards, alerts, empty states, and loading states come from shared components.
Public storytelling may be cinematic; transactional UI stays fast and familiar.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal Cobalt is rare. It appears on the primary action, selected state, focus, and true information emphasis only.

rules.name: The State Text Rule
rules.body: Semantic color never carries meaning alone. Every status needs a text label and an explanation or next action when state is degraded.

rules.name: The Product Type Rule
rules.body: Task UI uses fixed rem scales. Fluid display type is allowed only on public storytelling surfaces.

rules.name: The Raised When It Matters Rule

dos: Do build screens from shared AE shells, surfaces, forms, status, and feedback components.
Do apply /taste to public storytelling and /impeccable hardening to every task flow.
Do keep status text and focus visible without relying on color alone.
donts: Don't ship default shadcn styling without AE tokens and composition.
Don't create screen-local buttons, badges, cards, alerts, empty states, loading states, form layouts, or status colors.
Don't add payments, wallet, marketplace, hosted agents, request market, MCP, OpenAPI, or callable UI before phase gates.
Don't use AI-purple gradients, hero metrics, fake dashboard previews, decorative glassmorphism, or repeated three-card grids.
